title: DefaultEdit49
description: This is a Default Edit (shocking) from me. It enhances the Vanilla Textures with my own style. It's also multifunctional : for PVP, Building and Survival
body: # DefaultEdit49 This is a Default Edit from me. It enhances the Vanilla Textures with my own style. It is Multifunctional. ## This Resource Packs does many things like: - Shorter Swords - New Environment Textures (for example : Grass, Sand, Stone) - Outlines for Ores - Connected Textures for Glass, Ores and Wool(needs Optifine or other CTM Mod/s) - Transparent GUI - Seetrough Doors - Cleaner Rails - Tons of animated Textures - and many more edited Textures (see Pictures) ## IMPORTANT: - You need a CTM mod for some Features like Connected Textures and Random Textures - This Texture Pack is for 1.18.2. It can be used for 1.19+, but it isn't doesn't always work! - Don't reupload my Texture Pack without permission - The Texture Pack doesn't need to be extracted.
